chapters.title: The Human Element: Foundations of SE
chapters.description: Why hack a firewall when you can just ask for the password? Unlock the psychology of trust and deception.

chapters.title: Information Goldmine: OSINT & Pretexting
chapters.description: Master the art of passive recon. Learn to build the perfect disguise (pretext) using only public data.

chapters.title: The Art of Influence: Cialdini's Weapons
chapters.description: Reciprocity, Scarcity, Authority. Deploy psychological triggers that force humans to comply.

chapters.title: Phishing Dynamics: Hooking the Phish
chapters.description: Beyond the spam folder. Crafting emails and landing pages that bypass logic and firewalls.

chapters.title: Vishing & Impersonation: Voice as a Weapon
chapters.description: Spoofing caller ID, manipulating gatekeepers, and controlling the conversation flow.

chapters.title: Physical Bypass: The Tailgater's Playbook
chapters.description: Clipboards, confidence, and coffee runs. Entering secure buildings without a badge.

chapters.title: USB Drop Attacks & Baiting
chapters.description: Weaponizing curiosity. Why that 'Lost USB Drive' is the most dangerous device in the parking lot.

chapters.title: Building the Pretext: Deep Cover
chapters.description: Creating believable personas, managing 'The Pinch', and crisis management.

chapters.title: Elicitation & Interrogation Techniques
chapters.description: Getting answers without asking questions. Mirroring, presupposition, and the art of listening.

chapters.title: Macros & Maldocs: Technical Payload Delivery
chapters.description: Creating the weapon. Understanding VBA stagers and bypassing Mark-of-the-Web.

chapters.title: Defense Evasion & Reporting
chapters.description: Staying off the radar. How to document a Red Team engagement professionally.

chapters.title: The Red Team Mindset: Capstone
chapters.description: Putting it all together. Designing a full-cycle social engineering campaign.
